name: CENTRAL INSTITUTE OF PETROCHEMICALS ENGINEERING & TECHNOLOGY (CIPET)
profile: Central Institute of Petrochemicals Engineering & Technology (CIPET) (formerly known as Central Institute of Plastics Engineering & Technology (CIPET)) was established in 1968 by Government of India with the assistance of United Nations Development Programme (UNDP) at Chennai. The main objective of setting up of this specialized institute was to develop manpower in different disciplines of Plastics Engineering & Technology as no similar institute was in existence in the country. International Labour Organization (ILO) served as the executing agency. During the initial project period between 1968 and 1973, the institute achieved the targets envisaged and was rated as one of the most successful UNDP projects implemented worldwide. Today CIPET is a premier Academic institution for higher & technical education under the Ministry of Chemicals & Fertilizers, Govt. of India fully devoted in all the domains of plastics viz:- Design, CAD/CAM/CAE, Tooling & Mould Manufacturing, Production Engineering, Testing and Quality Assurance. CIPET operates from various locations spread across the country to cater the needs of the Polymer and allied industries.

profile:
Founded in 1967, KLJ is not only the Largest Manufacturer and the Market Leader in Plasticizers & Polymer Compounds in South Asia, but also an outright leader in the Secondary Plasticizer - Chlorinated Paraffin segment as the Largest Manufacturer across the Globe. Their Ultra-Modern Manufacturing facilities in Silvassa, Bharuch, Agra & Kutch in India, Rayong in Thailand and Mesaieed in Qatar are equipped with State-of-the-Art Technology and Equipment, producing a wide range of products to meet their Customers’ Requirements.
 
Group has a combined Manufacturing Capacity of 1.4 Million tpa.
 
In 2022, Group has started an integrated manufacturing plant with installed capacity of 300,000 tpa of Plasticizers and 100,000 tpa of Phthalic Anhydride in Bharuch, India.
 
In 2019, a State-of-the-Art Chlor Alkali complex in Qatar was established with a total investment in excess of USD 125 Million. It is a joint venture project with Qatar Industrial Manufacturing Co. (QIMC).
 
In 2016, Group had diversified into manufacturing of Benzyl Derivatives in Bharuch, India with installed capacity of 30,000 tpa further expended to 50,000 tpa in 2024
 
The Group has also made strong in-roads into the Trading of Petrochemicals and is proud to be No.1 Chemical Distribution Companies in India (among TOP 50 in the world).
 
Identifying infrastructure as a significant factor in the development of the national economy, the Group has also expanded into Real Estate Development.

name: NORDMECCANICA INDIA PRIVATE LIMITED
profile:
Nordmeccanica is the world’s leading manufacturer of coating, laminating, and metallizing machinery. For over 40 years, the company based in Piacenza has combined specialized know-how in the packaging sector with continuous product research and innovation.

The story of Nordmeccanica is one of success, the result of 40 years of challenges and investment in continuous improvement. 

From the first models built in the 1970s to the futuristic Triplex SL One-Shot, Nordmeccanica has experienced steady growth, increasing both its production capacity and exports: from an initial 3,000 m² to today’s 35,000 m². Annual production now reaches nearly 250 units, with more than 4,000 machines installed worldwide.

In 2024, Nordmeccanica surpassed €100 million in revenue, with exports accounting for 90% of the total, confirming the company's strong international focus and its role as a global player in the industry.

Today, the company operates across four continents, with facilities in Piacenza, New York, Shanghai, Mumbai, and Buenos Aires, and a network of representatives in 87 countries around the world.

The Group's structure and ongoing managerial evolution still center around the Cerciello family: Antonio serves as President, while his sons Vincenzo (Vice-President) and Alfredo (CFO) lead the strategic functions of commercial and finance.

PRODUCTS AND APPLICATION SECTORS
Nordmeccanica specializes in manufacturing machines for specific phases of the packaging process, offering solutions based on intended use:

? Combi Technology Machines: Two-layer lamination and coatings/functional coatings, designed for maximum modularity and functionality, tailored to the customer's production needs.

? Solventless Technology Machines: Two- or three-layer lamination using solvent-free adhesives, with models such as Simplex, Duplex, and Triplex, which differ in productivity and layout flexibility.

? Vacuum Metallizing Machines: Consolidated vacuum technology enhanced by innovative solutions to ensure fast coating turnaround times.
